I

implementations - package implementations
Contains concrete implementations of the Dictionary ADT.
isEmpty() - Method in class implementations.MyArrayList
Returns true if this list contains no elements.
isEmpty() - Method in class implementations.MyDLL
Returns true if this list contains no elements.
isEmpty() - Method in class implementations.MyQueue
Returns true when this queue contains no items.
isEmpty() - Method in class implementations.MyStack
Returns true if this stack contains no elements.
isEmpty() - Method in interface utilities.ListADT
Returns true if this list contains no elements.
isEmpty() - Method in interface utilities.QueueADT
Returns true if this queue contains no elements.
isEmpty() - Method in interface utilities.StackADT
Returns true if this stack co ntains no elements.
isFull() - Method in class implementations.MyQueue
Returns true if the queue is at capacity.
isFull() - Method in interface utilities.QueueADT
Returns true if the number of elements in the queue equals its fixed maximum capacity.
isReported() - Method in class appDomain.Tag
Returns whether this tag has already been printed as an error.
iterator() - Method in class implementations.MyArrayList
Returns an iterator over the elements in this list in proper sequence.
iterator() - Method in class implementations.MyDLL
Returns an iterator over the elements in this list in proper sequence.
iterator() - Method in class implementations.MyQueue
Returns an iterator over the elements in this queue, from front to back, in proper sequence.
iterator() - Method in class implementations.MyStack
Returns an iterator over the elements in this stack, from top to bottom.
Iterator<E> - Interface in utilities
This interface will provide an mono-directional iterator for any of the data structures that are specified in this package.
iterator() - Method in interface utilities.ListADT
Returns an iterator over the elements in this list, in proper sequence.
iterator() - Method in interface utilities.QueueADT
Returns an iterator over the elements in this queue in proper sequence, from front to back.
iterator() - Method in interface utilities.StackADT
Returns an iterator over the elements in this stack in proper sequence, from top to bottom.
